title: App Launch and Process Lifecycle
interaction_flow: GUI ready event → ProcessService._init(): creates InitProcess(NULL_UUID), calls register_(root)
GUI ready event → LaunchOnInitService._init(): reads gui_params.launch_options.on_initialized, calls run_(command) for each
ProcessService.__on_gui:ready() → svc_exec.launchApp({app_name}) for each INITRC entry
Caller → ExecService.launchApp({app_name, args, pseudonym, file_paths, items}, ipc_context)
ExecService (godmode path) → puter.apps.get(app_name)  [get target app info]
ExecService (godmode path) → puter.fs.sign(target_app.uuid, {path, action:'write'})  [create file signature]
launch_app: checks privateAccess decision; may redirect to fallbackAppName recursively
launch_app (explorer/trash) → new PseudoProcess({uuid, name, parent, meta})
launch_app (other apps) → new PortalProcess({uuid, name, parent, meta})
launch_app → UIWindow({element_uuid, iframe_url, title, icon, ...window_options})  [creates app window/iframe]
ProcessService.register(process) → register_(process): push to processes[], processes_map, uuid_to_treelist
ProcessService.register(process) → attach_to_parent_(process): set process.parent=NULL_UUID if unset, push to parent's treelist
User → UIWindowTaskManager(): gets svc_process, builds table, calls update_tasks()
end_process: if process.is_init() or force → UIAlert(confirmation message)
process.signal → triggers teardown; ProcessService.unregister(uuid) removes from map, transfers children to InitProcess
ProcessService.unregister(uuid) → delete from processes_map, splice from processes[]
ProcessService.unregister(uuid) → for each child: child.parent = NULL_UUID, attach_to_parent_(child)
ProcessService(backend).start({name, fullpath, command, args, env}) → child_process.spawn(command, args, {shell:true, env, cwd})
key_relationships: ExecService calls launch_app helper — core launch logic
launch_app creates PortalProcess | PseudoProcess — then registers via ProcessService
launch_app calls UIWindow — creates the app iframe window
UIWindowTaskManager reads ProcessService — get_init(), get_children_of(), get_by_uuid()
UIWindowTaskManager calls end_process() — which calls process.signal()
LaunchOnInitService reads gui_params.launch_options — dispatches window-call commands on boot
ProcessService (backend) extends BaseService — manages OS-level spawned child processes
AppService (backend) extends BaseService — CRUD for app records via AppRepository + DB
process_types: PortalProcess — represents an iframe-based app (has references.iframe, references.el_win)
important_notes: Two distinct ProcessServices exist: GUI (src/gui/src/services/ProcessService.js) manages frontend PortalProcess/PseudoProcess trees; Backend (src/backend/src/modules/hostos/ProcessService.js) manages OS-spawned child processes (spawn). ExecService.launchApp is the primary frontend entry point and is also exposed as an IPC handler. launch_app helper is the actual implementation body for app launching. ProcessService.unregister() re-parents orphaned children to InitProcess. UIWindowTaskManager polls every 500ms to refresh the process tree display.
